channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Australia to introduce digital passenger cards at all international airports
item.description: News Corp Australia has issued a notice regarding the implementation of digital passenger cards at all Australian international airports. The article explains that the rollout is part of a broader ini...

item.title: Businessman Arrested Over Arson Attacks Causing R800,000 Damage in Polokwane
item.description: A businessman in Polokwane, South Africa, has been arrested over two arson incidents that caused approximately R800,000 in damage. The suspect, identified through police investigations, was apprehende...

item.title: Kenyan Engineer Proves Academic Success After Online Criticism
item.description: Ian Odhiambo, a Kenyan mechanical engineer and political blogger, faced online criticism claiming he dropped out of school in class seven. In response, he shared his KCPE certificate showing straight ...

item.title: Protest against land allotment for political office sparks nationwide concern
item.description: An all-party forum in Nandyal, Andhra Pradesh, has announced a massive protest (Maha Satyagraha) on July 25 to challenge the government's decision to allocate public land in Nunepalle Market Yard for ...

item.title: New Brunswick Report Warns Against Co-Sleeping and Unsafe Infant Care Practices
item.description: A recent report from New Brunswick has issued warnings to parents about the risks of co-sleeping with infants and other unsafe caregiving practices. The study, published by local health authorities, h...

item.title: Foreign Nations Use Propaganda to Fuel Controversy Over AI Data Centers
item.description: The article details how China, Russia, and other nations are employing state media and social media campaigns to stoke public debate about the placement of AI data centers in the United States. Exampl...

item.title: Lebo Mashile Reflects on Collaborating with Hollywood Stars in South African Film Project
item.description: Lebo Mashile, the acclaimed South African actress, poet, and presenter, discusses her experience starring in the American psychological thriller 'Strung' alongside Hollywood stars Chloe Bailey, Lynn W...

item.title: Mixx Rewards Customers with Cash Prizes via Super App
item.description: Mixx, a financial services provider in Tanzania, has rewarded three customers with Sh1 million each as part of its ongoing Mixx Super World Cup Campaign. The prizes were presented at the Yas pavilion ...

item.title: Canada and U.S. Finalize Bridge Agreement with Mixed Reactions
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney has defended the Gordie Howe International Bridge agreement between Canada and the U.S., calling it a 'good deal for Canada' despite criticism from some politicians. The bri...

item.title: Gowon Commends Buhari's Fair Governance Without Regional Bias
item.description: Former Head of State, General Yakubu Gowon, praised late President Muhammadu Buhari for his unbiased leadership during his eight-year tenure, emphasizing that Buhari treated all regions and states equ...

item.title: Defense Challenges Inconsistencies in NBI Investigation During Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: The defense team of Vice President Sara Duterte has raised significant concerns about the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) probe into allegations of her threatening President Ferdinand Marcos Jr...

item.title: Governor Makinde's Comments on School Abduction Spark Political Debate in Nigeria
item.description: Governor Seyi Makinde's remarks linking the Oyo State school abduction to his presidential ambitions have sparked nationwide criticism. Nigerians are demanding urgent action on security, not political...

item.title: Veteran actor Sam Neill dies at 78 following cancer battle, leaving legacy in film and television
item.description: Veteran Australian actor Sam Neill has passed away at the age of 78, marking the end of a distinguished career that spanned over five decades. The Jurassic Park star, known for his iconic role as Ian ...

item.title: Modi's visit highlights tensions within Indian diaspora amid nationalist and supremacist groups
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi's recent visit to Australia sparked significant political discourse, particularly around the Indian diaspora's complex position between Hindu nationalist movements and whi...

item.title: Truck collision in Pune leaves three dead, ten injured
item.description: A severe road accident occurred in Pune district of Maharashtra on Monday when a truck collided with a group of warkari pilgrims. The incident took place on Saswad Jejuri Road, where the truck, carryi...

item.title: NBI Finds No Validated Info on Alleged Sara Duterte Hitman in Impeachment Trial
item.description: During the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) testified that it has not found any validated information to identify the alleged hitman contrac...

item.title: Protecting Independent Journalism in Somalia: Legal, Funding, and Digital Security Strategies
item.description: The article discusses the urgent need to protect independent journalism in Somalia amid government crackdowns and declining press freedom. It highlights the arrest and assault of The Guardian journali...

item.title: Counter-Terrorism Police Investigate Ann Widdecombe's Death After New Evidence
item.description: The death of Ann Widdecombe, a former Conservative minister and Reform UK spokeswoman, has prompted counter-terrorism police to lead the investigation following new evidence. A 28-year-old man from Ro...

item.title: A Ukrainian Photographer's Analog Chronicle of War in Kharkiv
item.description: Vladyslav Krasnoshchok's 'Documentation of the War' offers a profound exploration of the Russian invasion of Ukraine through an analog photographic process. By capturing the daily realities of life in...

item.title: Uber Kenya Support Hubs: How to Locate and Contact for Driver Assistance
item.description: The article provides a comprehensive guide on locating Uber Kenya's driver support hubs, contact details, and eligibility criteria for drivers. It explains how to find the nearest Greenlight Hub throu...
